summary.key_theme: NextEra Energy 獲得聯邦政府批准開發 10 GW 天然氣發電項目，強勁的基礎設施擴張計畫與數據中心電力需求帶動市場看好其成長前景。

bullish.title: NextEra Energy receives approval from President Donald J. Trump to develop up to 10 GW of natural gas‑powered generation
bullish.reason: 獲得總統批准開發 10 GW 天然氣發電項目，顯著提升公司未來發電容量與營收成長潛力，為最核心的利多消息。

bullish.title: NextEra Energy (NEE) Emerges as a Top Technical Breakout Candidate
bullish.reason: 技術指標顯示強勁的突破訊號，評級與設置分數均極高，吸引動能交易者關注。

bullish.title: NextEra Surges Past Industry Over a Year: How to Play the Stock?
bullish.reason: 過去一年股價表現優於大盤與同業，受惠於清潔能源需求與降息環境，基本面強勁。

bullish.title: A Look At NextEra Energy (NEE) Valuation As New Data Center Power Buildout Plan Emerges
bullish.reason: 針對數據中心電力需求的策略佈局，符合當前 AI 基礎設施建設的市場熱點。

bullish.title: NextEra Energy (NEE) Gains As Market Dips: What You Should Know
bullish.reason: 在市場整體回調時展現抗跌性與逆勢上漲，顯示資金避險與配置需求。

bearish.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NEE) Plans to Sell $2 billion in Equity Units to Fund Energy Projects
bearish.reason: 計畫發行 20 億美元股權單位，雖然用於投資項目，但短期內會造成現有股東權益稀釋。

neutral.title: Better Utility Stock: Constellation Energy vs. NextEra Energy
neutral.reason: 僅為同業比較分析，未對公司基本面產生直接影響。

neutral.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NEE) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為投資人關注度整理，提供基本資訊供參考，無實質利多或利空。

neutral.title: PGIM Jennison Utility Fund Q4 2025 Portfolio Movers
neutral.reason: 反映基金經理人過去的持倉調整，屬於歷史數據，對當前股價影響有限。
